prompt: Create a candid flash photograph of two stylish friends posing closely at an indoor party or lounge, shot from slightly above with a wide-angle lens and warm amber color grading. The scene shows exactly 2 people: on the left, a woman in a cream one-shoulder fitted dress with a sculptural rosette at the chest, long straight black hair, small earrings, and dark oval sunglasses, leaning forward with one hand resting against her cheek; on the right, a man in a black short-sleeve polo shirt with curly reddish-brown hair and small dark sunglasses, leaning in with one hand behind his back. Cover each person's face with a centered opaque square privacy block in a warm tan-brown color, exactly 2 face blocks total, leaving hair, sunglasses edges, shoulders, and clothing visible. The background is a cozy retro interior with vertical wood paneling, beige curtains, a red curtain at the left, reddish carpet, and large glowing white spherical pendant lights near the top edge, including exactly 4 visible globe lights: one cropped at the top-left corner, one large central globe, and two overlapping globes at the top-right. Use direct on-camera flash, high ISO party-photo texture, slight motion softness, realistic skin tones, strong warm highlights, intimate celebrity-event snapshot feel, square crop, no text, no watermark.
